name: real-editor-runtime-log-capture-and-diagnostics
title: real-editor-runtime-log-capture-and-diagnostics
description: Implement the first real runtime diagnostics loop by tailing Godot's built-in file logs and exposing them through get_editor_logs.
creator: chasel
notes: Derived from the readiness assessment task. Scope intentionally focuses on real runtime feedback using official Godot file logging rather than speculative Output panel interception.
